message:
fix(abi): revert IDNA malloc to libc::malloc and harden runtime math log test

glibc_internal_abi: Revert __idna_to_dns_encoding and
__idna_from_dns_encoding allocations from crate::malloc_abi::raw_alloc
back to libc::malloc — these buffers are returned to callers who expect
to free them with standard free(), so they must be allocated from the
system allocator.

runtime_policy: Make runtime_math_log_wrapper test more robust by
retrying up to 8 times with varying base_addr/requested_bytes until
the cadence-gated decision log actually emits a runtime_decision event,
rather than assuming a single drive_decisions_until_evidence call is
sufficient (it may not produce a sampled decision on the first try
depending on cadence state).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
